untranslatable_reason: Hurst Exponent is not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal fundamentally requires calculation of the Hurst Exponent to measure mean-reversion vs. trending behavior. Without this indicator, the regime detection logic cannot be properly implemented. As a fallback, log_returns variance has been approximated, but this does not capture the true Hurst Exponent measurement described in the original rule.
translation_notes: The Hurst Exponent threshold (0.40, 0.45) cannot be directly translated. The rule requires a specialized statistical measure not in the allowed indicator set. The entry/exit conditions have been approximated using log_returns as a proxy for detecting stationary diffusion, but this is fundamentally incomplete. ADX_14 could be considered as a trend-strength proxy, but would not directly measure mean-reversion characteristics as intended by the original signal.
